recipes.name: Easy teriyaki chicken

recipes.name: Lazy gal satay noodles

ingredients: 1 tbs crushed peanuts spring onion and satay chicken

recipes.name: Apple & custard
recipes.notes: You can use tinned or fresh apple slices. You can omit the Biscoff spread of replace it with almond butter or caramel sauce. We use Red Tractor Creamy Protein Oats, Macro Mike Vanilla Buttercream Almond Protein powder, Almond Breeze Unsweetened Almond Milk, Steeves Maples Sugar Free Maple Syrup and Pauls Premium Custard for these macros.

recipes.name: Apple & custard baked oats

40ml milk the egg, milk, protein powder

recipes.name: The best scrambled eggs
recipes.notes: We use Lite Nuttelex for these macros. The trick to the best scrambled eggs is to cook them low and slow. Don’t viciously scramble, try stirring and folding instead. When they begin to form, remove from heat and allow to continue cooking on their own. For extra yum, whisk 1/4 cup cottage cheese with the eggs.

recipes.name: The best scrambled eggs
recipes.notes: You can use basil or sun-dried tomato pesto. We use Leggos Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto, Coles Light Cream Cheese and Country Split Bread for these macros.

recipes.name: Butter chicken
recipes.notes: We use Chobani 0% Greek Yoghurt, Bulla Light Thickened Cooking Cream, Nuttelex Lite Margarine Spread and Natvia Natural Sweetener for these macros. MARINATE METHOD 600g chicken breast, diced Place chicken in a bowl with 1/2 cup Greek yogurt remaining marinate ingredients, (120g) toss to coat. Refrigerate for 2 tsp garam masala minimum 1 hour or overnight. 1 tsp each - turmeric & Melt the butter in a fry pan over ground cumin medium-high heat. Add the 1/4 tsp cayenne pepper chicken and cook for 5 minutes 1 tbs fresh ginger, minced until browned. 2 cloves garlic, minced Add tomato passata, cream, sweetener and salt, stir to CURRY combine. Simmer for 15-20 minutes until the chicken is 1 1/2 tbs butter (20g) cooked through and sauce 1 cup tomato puree / passata (250ml) thickens. 1 cup light cooking cream Serve with rice. (250ml) 1 tbs sweetener 1 tsp salt 150g rice, uncooked Nutrition SERVINGS 4 SIZE 1 CALORIES 463 CARBS 36.6G FAT 16.3G PROTEIN 41G 151

recipes.name: Butter chicken
ingredients: 1 tsp each - garam masala, toss to coat. Refrigerate for
1/2 cup canned tomatoes To the same pan
recipes.notes: We use Chobani 0% Greek Yoghurt, Bulla Light Thickened Cooking Cream and Natvia Natural Sweetener for these macros. MARINATE METHOD 600g chicken breast Place chicken in a bowl with 1/4 cup Greek yogurt (60g) remaining marinate ingredients, 1 tsp each - garam masala, toss to coat. Refrigerate for turmeric, paprika, fresh minimum 1 hour or overnight. ginger & fresh garlic Add the onion to a pan over medium heat, sauté for 2-3 CURRY minutes until softened. Add 1 onion, diced spices, almonds and tomatoes, 1 tsp each - turmeric & cook for 1 minute. Transfer the fresh garlic mixture to a blender and blitz 1/2 tsp each - garam masala, cumin, paprika until it forms a paste, set aside. 1/2 cup canned tomatoes To the same pan, cook the (150g) chicken for 5 minutes until 20g almonds/ cashews browned. Add the paste and cook 150ml chicken stock for an additional 2 minutes. 80ml light cooking cream Add the stock and simmer for 1 tbs sweetener 15 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and sauce has 1 tsp salt thickened. Stir in the cream, 150g rice, uncooked sweetener and salt, simmer until heated through. Nutrition Serve with rice. SERVINGS 4 SIZE 1 CALORIES 403 CARBS 35.9G FAT 8.3G PROTEIN 54.2G 153

recipes.name: Chicken korma
ingredients: 1/4 tsp chilli powder, with yoghurt, oil, 1/2 the spice
600g chicken breast, diced Melt the butter
recipes.notes: We use Chobani 0% Greek Yoghurt, Bulla Light Thickened Cooking Cream and Nuttelex Lite for these macros. SPICE MIX METHOD 2 tsp each - paprika, Mix the spice ingredients together garam masala, cumin in a small bowl. 1 tsp each - turmeric, coriander, salt Place the chicken in a large bowl 1/4 tsp chilli powder, with yoghurt, oil, 1/2 the spice optional mix, 1/2 the garlic and 1/2 the ginger, mix to coat. Refrigerate for minimum 1 hour or overnight. CURRY 600g chicken breast, diced Melt the butter in a pan over 1/2 cup Greek yogurt medium heat. Add the onion (120g) and sauté for 1-2 minutes. Add 1/2 tbs each – butter & oil remaining spice mix, garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds. Add 2 garlic cloves, minced tomatoes and cream, stir and 1 tbs ginger, minced simmer for 5 minutes. Transfer to 1/2 onion, diced a blender and blitz until smooth, 400g canned diced set aside. tomatoes/ passata To the same pan, add the chicken 150ml light cooking cream and cook for 5 minutes until 150g rice, uncooked browned. Add the sauce and simmer for 10 minutes until Nutrition chicken is cooked through. Serve with rice. SERVINGS 4 SIZE 1 CALORIES 465 CARBS 40.9G FAT 12.1G PROTEIN 54.8G 155

recipes.name: Chicken tikka masala
ingredients: 125-180ml chicken/ sweetener, fish sauce and lime leaves
recipes.notes: We use Ayam Coconut Milk Light, Maesri Green Curry Paste and Natvia Brown Sweetener for theses macros. You can use coconut sugar, brown sugar, white sugar or maple syrup to sweeten the curry and adjust to your taste preference. SPICE MIX METHOD 270ml canned coconut Add 3 tbs of coconut milk to a saucepan milk over medium heat, simmer for 1 minute until 4-6 tbs green curry paste thickened. Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 (112g) minutes. 500g chicken breast/ tofu, diced Add the remaining coconut milk, stock, 125-180ml chicken/ sweetener, fish sauce and lime leaves. Stir and vegetable stock simmer for 2 minutes. ½ tbs sweetener Add the chicken, reduce the heat to low and ½ tbs fish sauce simmer for 7 minutes. 4 kaffir lime leaves, torn Add the zucchini and simmer for another 5 1 zucchini, sliced minutes until vegetables have softened and 2 cups snow peas chicken is cooked through, 1 red chilli, optional Add snow peas, chilli and Thai basil leaves, ¼ cup Thai basil leaves simmer for another 2 minutes. 150g rice, uncooked Serve with rice, a squeeze of lime juice and 1 lime, cut into wedges garnish with spring onion. 1 sprig spring onion, diced Nutrition SERVINGS 4 SIZE 1 CALORIES 448 CARBS 42.5G FAT 13.8G PROTEIN 35.6G 157

BASE METHOD 2 Weet-Bix For the jam, add 50g strawberries and sweetener to a saucepan or 80ml milk microwave safe bowl, heat until 1 tbs sweetener softened. CREAM Crush Weet-Bix in a bowl, then 130g yoghurt mix in the milk and sweetener. 30g light cream cheese Smooth over with a spoon to form the base. Top with remaining 15g vanilla protein powder, strawberries. optional In a separate bowl, mix cream 1 tsp sweetener, optional filling ingredients together until 1 tsp lemon juice/zest, to smooth. Spread over the base. taste Spread the jam on top and place in the fridge for a minimum of 1 hour or overnight. recipes.name: Low carb quesadillas
ingredients: 1 tomato, diced 3 bowls. Top with the corn salsa, tomato
recipes.notes: You can use white potato or sweet potato for this recipe. We use Spud Lite Potatoes and Bega 50% Less Fat cheese for these macros. CHICKPEA SALSA METHOD 2 potatoes, diced Preheat the oven to 200°C. 1 red onion, sliced into wedges Add potatoes and onion to an oven safe dish. 2 tsp olive oil Drizzle with 1/2 the olive oil and season with 400g can chickpeas, drained & salt & pepper. Place in the oven for 25 minutes rinsed or until crispy. 70g tomato paste Meanwhile, add the corn to a fry pan 1 cup vegetable stock over high heat and cook for 2-3 minutes 10-15g fajita seasoning until charred. Transfer to a bowl, add the 1 garlic clove, minced cucumber, lemon juice and season with salt & pepper. Mix to combine and set aside. To the same pan, heat remaining oil then add CORN SALSA the chickpeas, tomato paste, fajita seasoning 125g can sweet corn, drained and garlic. Mix and sauté for 1-2 minutes. 1/2 cucumber, diced Add the stock and simmer for another 5 Lemon/ lime juice, to taste minutes. Add the roasted potatoes to the pan, mix to combine then remove from the heat and cover with a lid. Rest for 1-2 minutes. TO SERVE 300g cooked rice Divide the rice and chickpea mixture between 1 tomato, diced 3 bowls. Top with the corn salsa, tomato and a tablespoon of sour cream. Sprinkle over the Fresh coriander, chopped cheese and garnish with corainder to serve. 30g cheese, grated 3 tbs sour cream/ ricotta Nutrition SERVINGS 3 SIZE 1 CALORIES 415 CARBS 60G FAT 8.9G PROTEIN 17.4G 198

recipes.notes: We use Bega 50% Less Fat cheese and Chobani 0% Greek Yoghurt for these macros. The Mexican chicken can also be used in tacos, burritos or nachos.

recipes.notes: Cream cheese can be substituted with milk. Optional to add in extra veggies or protein of choice (bacon, chicken etc). We use Heinz Big Red Salt Reduced Condensed Tomato Soup, Vetta Protein Pasta, Philadelphia 40% Less Fat Light Spreadable Cream Cheese and Bega 50% Less Fat cheese for these macros.

recipes.notes: We use Vetta Smart Protein Pasta, Coles Light Mozzarella and Almond Breeze Unsweetened Almond Milk for these macros. Optional to add extra vegetables, we recommend spinach, cherry tomatoes or sun-dried tomatoes.

ingredients: 3 garlic cloves the pasta per packet directions
recipes.notes: We use Vetta Smart Protein Pasta and Philadelphia 40% Less Fat Light Spreadable Cream Cheese for these macros. To make the pasta extra yum, use a sweet chilli cream cheese. The sauce is generous if you wish to add more pasta. Optional to add chicken for extra protein.

recipes.name: Vegetarian lasagna
recipes.notes: We use Vetta Smart Protein Pasta, Coles Finest Australian Pork Sausages (Italian Style) and Philadelphia 60% Less Fat Light Cooking Cream for these macros. For a lower calorie and lower fat option, replace cooking cream with plain Greek yoghurt.
